mapper.select: /* wif-das-robotdasaddbox-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAddBoxWaveSeq - RobotDAS 박스추가 요청 Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_boxadd_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-robotdasaddbox-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAddBoxOrderSeq - RobotDAS 박스추가 요청 Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_boxadd_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-robotdasaddbox-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAddBoxItemSeq - RobotDAS 박스추가 요청 Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_boxadd_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
